code: import{useState}from'react';import api from'../api/client';import LoadingSpinner from'../components/LoadingSpinner';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function HospitalLocator(){const[city,setCity]=useState('');const[items,setItems]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const search=async()=>{setLoading(true);const{data}=await api.get('/hospitals',{params:{city}});setItems(data);setLoading(false);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container py-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Hospital Locator"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"d-flex gap-2 my-3",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"form-control",placeholder:"Enter city",value:city,onChange:e=>setCity(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn-danger",onClick:search,children:"Search"})]}),loading&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LoadingSpinner,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"list-group",children:items.map(h=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"list-group-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h6",{className:"mb-1",children:h.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("small",{children:[h.address,", ",h.city," | ",h.phone]})]},h.id))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"ratio ratio-16x9 mt-4",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("iframe",{title:"map",src:"https://maps.google.com/maps?q=India&t=&z=5&ie=UTF8&iwloc=&output=embed",allowFullScreen:true})})]});}export default HospitalLocator;
